description: This file manages user authentication state by providing functions to get, set, and clear user session data using persistent storage (AsyncStorage). It defines keys for storing token and user data, a type for user objects, and functions to handle session data retrieval and modification.

methods.name: export async function getSession(): Promise<{ token: string | null; user: StoredUser | null }> { getSession
methods.description: Asynchronously retrieves the stored session token and user data from persistent storage.

methods.name: export async function setSession(session: { token: string; user: StoredUser }): Promise<void> { setSession
methods.description: Asynchronously stores the provided session token and user data into persistent storage.

methods.name: export async function clearSession(): Promise<void> { clearSession
methods.description: Asynchronously clears the stored session token and user data from persistent storage.

ctags.name: StoredUser
ctags.pattern: /^export type StoredUser = { id: string; email: string; name?: string };$/

ctags.name: getSession
ctags.pattern: /^export async function getSession(): Promise<{ token: string | null; user: StoredUser | null }> {$/

ctags.name: setSession
ctags.pattern: /^export async function setSession(session: { token: string; user: StoredUser }): Promise<void> {$/
